source_jobs.title: Technical Architect, Shopify
source_jobs.description:
Lazer https://www.lazertechnologies.com is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!



Lazer Commerce is a specialized team within Lazer focused on crafting scalable, high-performing commerce experiences across the Shopify ecosystem. We partner with forward-thinking brands and agencies to design and implement custom storefronts, headless architectures, and robust backend integrations. From theme development to complex ERP and OMS workflows, our engineers bring deep expertise in Shopify, modern frameworks, and commerce infrastructure to help clients launch, scale, and optimize their digital retail experiences.



JOB SUMMARY

Lazer is seeking Technical Lead to lead the development of Shopify projects, crafting seamless user experiences and robust back-end solutions. As a Technical Lead on this team, you will support Lazer’s engineers in building products across our entire portfolio of clients and across every part of the Shopify stack (online, POS, etc.). You will work closely with key clients stakeholders, lead 2-3 projects, and have tremendous impact in supporting the engineers on the team to make sure execution is solid. You will also be a part of the strongest Shopify-focused engineering team in the market, and work closely with like-minded engineers who help each other continuously grow.

The Role

 - Lead 2-3 large commerce projects and work with the engineers on the team to ensure delivery excellence

 - Lead large commerce implementations from one commerce platforms onto Shopify (e.g. BigCommerce, Salesforce, Magento, WooCommerce migrations)

 - Lead ERP integrations (e.g. Netsuite), including familiarity with iPaaS solutions for such integrations

 - Lead CMS integrations (e.g. Sanity, Contentful, etc)

 - Understanding of the different components of the Shopify ecosystem (e.g. markets, checkout extensibility, functions, analytics, mobile, testing, etc)

 - Deep background in software and system architecture

 - Oversee Headless frontend development (e.g. React, Hydrogen, Next.js, Remix)

 - Oversee backend development (e.g. Node JS, Python, Go or Ruby preferred)

 - Knowledge of Liquid/Theme development

 - Lead OMS/WMS/IMS integrations (e.g. Manhattan)

 - Shopify app store development (i.e. building and launching apps privately for merchants or publicly on the Shopify App Store)

 - Subscriptions (e.g. Recharge, Ordergroove, Upscribe, or Shopify’s Native Subscriptions API)

 - Ensure flawless integration of third-party apps, APIs, and customizations.



Further Qualifications

 1.  Problem-solving: Ability to jump into a project/product with little context and high ambiguity and identify issues, investigate causes, and propose solutions proactively.

 2.  Decision-making: Confidence to make informed decisions and take action when appropriate.

 3.  Communication: Skill in keeping key client stakeholders, and team members informed about problems and solutions.

 4.  Consulting: Ability to consult and help clients through navig

source_jobs.title: Senior Delivery Manager, Enterprise AI
source_jobs.description:
Lazer https://www.lazertechnologies.com is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!




WHO YOU ARE

 - 7+ years at a top-tier consulting firm (McKinsey, BCG, Accenture, Deloitte, or equivalent) or an enterprise technology services environment; you have a proven track record delivering complex software initiatives end-to-end — owning scoping, execution, and launch. Startup or agency backgrounds are a plus, not a substitute for enterprise consulting experience.

 - Strong commercial instinct; you've managed enterprise client relationships worth $1M+ and know how to turn strong delivery into expanded engagements. Farming is a core part of how you operate — you identify opportunities early, close expansions, and grow the accounts you own.

 - Deep experience working directly with enterprise clients in a B2B or services environment; you manage relationships across C-suite, product, and engineering simultaneously, navigate ambiguity, and maintain trust in high-pressure, multi-stakeholder environments.

 - Strong operator with an unblocking mentality; you surface risks early, introduce structure where there is none, improve how teams work, and take ownership of getting work across the finish line — in both structured enterprise environments and ambiguous ones.

 - Comfortable operating on-site with clients; periodic embedded engagement is an expectation of this role. You show up in person at the moments that matter, thrive inside the client's environment, and build trust that goes beyond the project.

 - AI-forward in how you work; you use AI tools daily to automate your own workflows — status updates, reporting, communications — so your time stays focused on the relationships and decisions that only you can handle. Deep technical AI expertise is not required. Not actively using AI is a non-starter.

 - Technically fluent; you can work closely with engineers, understand system constraints, and translate clearly between technical execution and business outcomes.



 

What You'll Do

 - Own delivery end-to-end; scope projects with clients and engineering teams, define clear roadmaps, break work into phases, identify dependencies, and maintain momentum across large-scale, multi-workstream engagements through shifting priorities.

 - Be the structure your client cannot build themselves; define workstreams, establish operating cadence, and bring clarity to complex, ambiguous environments — and own the narrative of every engagement so every deliverable is paired with a clear story of its impact, tradeoffs, and next steps.

 - Navigate and actively manage multiple stakeholders; maintain a clear view of decision-makers, influencers, and blockers, and ensure alignment across product, engineering, and leadership. Operate effectively within enterprise environments — manage structured processes, reporting expectations, and cross-team dependencies while continuing to drive progress.

 - Act as a forward deployed operator; embed with client teams on-site

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer, Fintech
source_jobs.description:
Lazer https://www.lazertechnologies.com is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!




WHO YOU ARE

 - 6+ years of professional full-stack software development experience with proven expertise in both backend and frontend systems

 - Expert-level proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Next.js; Python or Go experience is a strong plus

 - Strong command of object-oriented programming principles and clean architecture practices for building maintainable, scalable systems

 - Proven track record building fintech products such as payment processors, lending platforms, trading systems, or expense management tools

 - Deep understanding of distributed systems concepts including consistency models, fault tolerance, and eventual consistency

 - Deep expertise architecting secure systems that handle sensitive financial data

 - Domain expertise and understanding of KYC, AML, compliance, and financial regulations

 - Proficiency with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and proven consulting/contracting experience with strong client management skills


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Embed with client teams to advise and guide founders on building scalable fintech products—from payment infrastructure to lending platforms to compliance systems

 - Design and develop full-stack fintech applications that prioritize security, regulatory compliance, and transaction integrity

 - Architect solutions that connect financial infrastructure securely, including integration with payment processors, banking partners, and compliance services

 - Mentor client engineering teams on best practices in secure coding, compliance-first design, and financial system reliability

 - Lead technical strategy discussions with fintech founders, managing complex project requirements and regulatory constraints


NICE TO HAVE

 - Background in traditional finance, investment banking, or regulated financial services

 - Familiarity with data warehouse solutions and analytics for financial systems

 - Experience with regulatory technology (RegTech) or compliance automation tools

 - Relevant industry certifications (security, compliance, or financial services)

AI in our hiring process
We use AI to help us review and shortlist applications based on job-related criteria. A human hiring manager always makes the call on who moves forward. As a company that builds with AI every day, we're all for candidates using it too — just be upfront about how it helped.

Why Work With Us

 - 🚀 Accelerate Your Growth: Work across multiple industries and cutting-edge projects with a team that ships fast.

 - 💥 Maximum Impact: Shape the future of the tech industry by helping ambitious projects reach their potential.

 - 🏅 True Ownership: Everyone ships code and has real autonomy with minimal meetings.

 - 💡 Continuous Learning: Be part of a team of senior engineers and designers who love learning and knowledge sharing.
   


WHY THIS MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

 - 🤖 You Resist Modern Tools:

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer, Fintech
source_jobs.description:

With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!




WHO YOU ARE:

 - 2-4 years of experience building and shipping production software, full-stack or backend-leaning.

 - Comfort across a modern web stack (TypeScript, React, Node.js). Python is a plus, especially for AI work.

 - AI-native: you build with AI by default (LLM APIs, agentic workflows, AI coding tools) and are comfortable shipping AI-powered features.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and a builder's instinct, with a keen attention to detail.

 - Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain technical tradeoffs to engineers, founders, and non-technical stakeholders alike.

 - Comfort working directly with clients, and an eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast-moving environment.

 - Some exposure to fintech or financial products, or a genuine interest in the domain, with an awareness of why security and compliance matter when handling financial data.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Embed with client teams to understand their users and their challenges, then build and extend their product to meet real needs.

 - Develop custom solutions and integrations that solve concrete client problems.

 - Translate what you learn from users into clear, actionable feedback for the client's product and engineering teams.

 - Build and maintain integrations with the services fintech products depend on: payment processors, banking partners, and financial data providers

 - Build full-stack features that are increasingly AI-powered (LLM-driven workflows, agentic features, and the product around them), using AI across your own workflow to ship faster while keeping quality high.

 - Support client teams with onboarding, documentation, and training on what you build, so it holds up after you roll off.

 - Build strong, trust-based relationships with client teams, acting as a technical partner and advocate, not just a contractor.
   
   


NICE TO HAVE:

The following would be a bonus experience to have, though highlight any additional experience or skills you may have. We like working with people with varied backgrounds and experiences.

 - AI-powered features that map well to fintech: document extraction (for KYC or statements), transaction categorization, support chatbots, search, or data normalization.

 - Creating MCP servers, or building deeper agentic tooling and testing infrastructure for agentic applications.

 - Background in fintech, regulated financial services, or experience with RegTech and compliance automation tools.

 - Experience with payment, banking, or financial data integrations.

 - Relevant open-source contributions or technical publications.

source_jobs.title: Senior Infrastructure/ DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Lazer https://www.lazertechnologies.com is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!




WHO YOU ARE


 - Seniority: Minimum of 5 years dedicated experience in DevOps, Infrastructure, or SRE roles. Expert Tooling: Must be an expert with Docker, Kubernetes (k8s), and Terraform/Pulumi.

 - Cloud Proficiency: Deep, proven expertise in either AWS or GCP infrastructure, with the ability to quickly grasp and transition to other cloud providers.

 - Development Skills: Strong ability to write clean, maintainable code for automation in Go, Python, or Node.js.

 - Security Focus: Demonstrable experience implementing and maintaining modern cloud security controls and meeting key compliance standards (SOC2, PIPEDA, HIPAA and/or GDPR).

 - Independent, Proactive, and Cross-Functional: Proven ability to quickly onboard, diagnose problems, and propose/implement solutions with minimal oversight. Experienced in a consultant or freelancer capacity, demonstrating an aptitude for understanding and effectively communicating with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
   
   
   
   WHAT YOU'LL DO
   

 - To be successful the candidate will be expected to rapidly deliver solutions leveraging the following specific cloud services and tooling down below:

 - Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Mastery: Quickly implement and adapt infrastructure using Terraform , Pulumi, or other major IaC tools.

 - Containers proficiency: Experience with Docker is critical. You must deeply understand how to design, build, and optimize secure, multi-stage Dockerfiles.

 - CI/CD Implementation: Design, build, and manage robust Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) pipelines to automate code testing, building, and deployment across environments.

 - Core Cloud Services (AWS or GCP): Proven ability to provision and manage foundational services. Deep expertise in one major cloud provider is required, with the understanding that knowledge is transferable to the other.

 - Container Compute: Expertise in at least one major container platform: EKS, GKE, ECS, Fargate, OR Cloud Run. (Expertise in Kubernetes (k8s) is still highly valued, particularly with EKS or and GKE.)

 - Networking: Understand when to use load balancers, VPNs for secure connectivity, and private VPCs for network isolation. Applies knowledge of subnetting, routing, VPC peering, and NAT gateways to build secure applications.

 - Storage: Experience with S3 (AWS) OR Cloud Storage (GCP).

 - Databases: Experience with RDS (AWS) OR CloudSQL (GCP).

 - Serverless: Deploy event-driven components using Cloud Functions (AWS Lambda/GCP Functions) or their equivalents.

 - CDNs, Message Queues.

 - Security: Understands the value of security such as protecting PII, the role of encryption, secrets management, network firewalls, and web application firewalls (AWS WAF, GCP Cloud Armor) following security best practices.

 - Automation & Scripting: Write high-quality automation and tooling using Go, Python, Node

Lazer Commerce is a specialized team within Lazer focused on crafting scalable, high-performing commerce experiences across the Shopify ecosystem. We partner with forward-thinking brands and agencies to design and implement custom storefronts, headless architectures, and robust backend integrations. From theme development to complex ERP and OMS workflows, our engineers bring deep expertise in Shopify, modern frameworks, and commerce infrastructure to help clients launch, scale, and optimize their digital retail experiences.




THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Product Manager to help shape, define, and deliver large-scale Shopify commerce experiences for leading brands.
In this role, you’ll bridge the gap between strategy, delivery, and technology — translating discovery insights into actionable roadmaps and ensuring every project delivers measurable value.

Please Note: This is a Contract position (hourly rate). We welcome applications from across the globe, but our preferred candidates should be able to have a meaningful overlap with Eastern Standard Timezone (EST).



WHO YOU ARE

 - You have 3+ years of experience in Product Management or similar roles (Business Analyst, Product Owner), ideally within a brand, agency, or consultancy environment.

 - You have a proven track record of delivering large-scale digital commerce projects, including platform migrations from legacy systems like SFCC, Magento, or Hybris to modern SaaS ecosystems.

 - You’re deeply familiar with Shopify Plus and the broader commerce technology stack — from ERP and OMS to PIM, CRM, CDP, and payments.

 - You thrive in enterprise stakeholder environments, collaborating confidently with C-suite, product, and engineering teams.

 - You’re fluent in agile delivery practices (Scrum, SAFe) and discovery frameworks, with a structured yet flexible mindset.

 - You’re an exceptional communicator and facilitator who can bring clarity, alignment, and focus to complex, multi-stakeholder projects.

 - You combine technical literacy (APIs, integrations, architecture fundamentals) with strong commercial acumen, always focused on ROI and client value.

 - You’re analytical and detail-oriented, comfortable defining and tracking KPIs that measure success and impact.

 - You’re adaptable and thrive in ambiguity — driving clarity, protecting scope, and helping teams deliver meaningful results.

Bonus Points If You Have:

 - Experience supporting multi-market or international merchants.

 - Familiarity with CRO, experimentation, and analytics tools.

 - Experience building or scaling a product management practice within an agency.
   
   


WHAT YOU'LL DO


Discovery & Scope Definition

Lazer Commerce is a specialized team within Lazer focused on crafting scalable, high-performing commerce experiences across the Shopify ecosystem. From platform migrations to ERP and OMS workflows, our team brings deep expertise in Shopify Plus, modern frameworks, and commerce infrastructure -- helping clients launch, scale, and optimize their digital retail experiences.



Job Summary:

Lazer is seeking an experienced Delivery Manager to lead the development of enterprise eCommerce platforms on Shopify. In this role, you will own the client relationship, manage budgets, and oversee the entire project lifecycle from strategy to execution. Acting as the primary liaison between enterprise clients and Lazer’s internal teams, you’ll ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and to the highest standards.

You will drive the strategic direction of projects, manage competing priorities, and foster collaboration across cross-functional teams. Your expertise in eCommerce, particularly Shopify, coupled with your project and product management skills, will empower you to lead complex platform migrations and deliver innovative solutions for enterprise clients.



The Role

 - Client Relationship Management:
   
   - Serve as the primary point of contact for enterprise clients, owning the client relationship and ensuring satisfaction throughout the project lifecycle.
   
   - Build strong relationships with senior stakeholders and C-suite executives to align project deliverables with business objectives.
   
   - Act as the client's trusted advisor, providing insights and recommendations to drive business growth and innovation.

 - Project Management:
   
   - Oversee end-to-end project delivery for Shopify-based eCommerce platforms, including migrations and custom implementations.
   
   - Create and manage comprehensive project plans, including timelines, budgets, resource allocation, and milestones.
   
   - Ensure project objectives align with client business drivers and are delivered on time and within budget.
   
   - Monitor and manage dependencies, risks, and issues, providing regular updates to stakeholders.

 - Product Ownership:
   
   - Define and prioritize product roadmaps, requirements, and user stories in collaboration with clients and internal teams.
   
   - Work closely with developers, designers, and QA engineers to ensure the successful implementation of features and functionalities.
   
   - Triage and manage defects, ensuring high-quality deliverables and securing QA sign-off.

 - Collaboration and Governance:
   
   - Facilitate communication and collaboration across cross-functional teams, third-party vendors, and clients.

source_jobs.title: Director of Delivery, Commerce
source_jobs.description:
Lazer https://www.lazertechnologies.com is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!



Job Summary:

Lazer is seeking an accomplished Director of Delivery, Shopify to lead the successful development and delivery of enterprise-grade eCommerce solutions for some of the world’s largest brands. In this strategic role, you will oversee the end-to-end delivery function, managing Technical Architects and Product Owners while owning the delivery pipeline for Shopify-based products.

This role demands a seasoned leader with deep expertise in Shopify and a proven background in project management, product management, and software engineering. You will be responsible for ensuring high-quality, on-time launches of complex commerce platforms, fostering cross-functional collaboration, and continuously innovating to improve the delivery process.




The Role

Delivery Leadership

 - Own the overall delivery function for Shopify projects, ensuring alignment with organizational goals and client expectations.

 - Oversee multiple project teams, including Product Owners and Technical Architects, to deliver scalable, high-performing eCommerce solutions.

 - Establish and maintain best practices for project delivery, focusing on efficiency, innovation, and quality.

 - Monitor delivery pipelines, budgets, and timelines, resolving roadblocks proactively.

Strategic Oversight

 - Collaborate with stakeholders to define project objectives and success metrics, ensuring alignment with client business strategies.

 - Drive initiatives for continuous improvement in delivery methodologies, incorporating feedback and emerging trends.

 - Lead platform migrations and custom implementations for enterprise brands, ensuring seamless transitions and robust performance.

Team Management

 - Recruit, mentor, and lead a high-performing team of Technical Architects, Product Owners, and other delivery personnel.

 - Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, and innovation within the delivery team.

 - Provide career development opportunities and regular performance feedback.

Client and Stakeholder Engagement

 - Act as a strategic advisor to enterprise clients, building trust with senior stakeholders and C-suite executives.

 - Lead governance meetings to provide delivery updates, address challenges, and align on priorities.

 - Serve as the escalation point for major delivery concerns, ensuring swift resolution and client satisfaction.

Technical and Process Expertise

 - Leverage your technical background to guide solution design, ensuring it aligns with Shopify best practices.

 - Oversee integrations with ERP, OMS, and CMS systems, ensuring compatibility and performance.

 - Champion Agile delivery methodologies, driving adherence to Scrum, Kanban, or hybrid frameworks as appropriate.




Qualifications

Professional Experience

 - 10+ years of experience in project delivery, product management, or software engineering, with a significant focus on eCommerce.

 - Containers: Docker is critical. Deeply understand how to design, build, and optimize secure, multi-stage Dockerfiles.

 - CI/CD: Design, build, and manage robust CI/CD pipelines to automate testing, building, and deployment across environments.

 - Container compute: Expertise in at least one major container platform: EKS, GKE, ECS, Fargate, or Cloud Run. (Kubernetes is highly valued, particularly EKS or GKE.)

 - Networking: Know when to use load balancers, VPNs for secure connectivity, and private VPCs for isolation. Apply subnetting, routing, VPC peering, and NAT gateways to build secure systems.

 - Storage: S3 (AWS) or Cloud Storage (GCP).

 - Databases: RDS (AWS) or CloudSQL (GCP).

 - Serverless: Deploy event-driven components using AWS Lambda, GCP Cloud Functions, or equivalents.

 - CDNs and message queues.

 - Security: Protect PII; apply encryption, secrets management, network firewalls, and web application firewalls (AWS WAF, GCP Cloud Armor) following security best practices.

 - Automation and scripting: Write high-quality automation and tooling in Go, Python, Node.js, or Bash for client-specific operational challenges.

 - Monitoring and operations: Ensure robust monitoring and high system uptime.
   


NICE TO HAVE:

The following would be a bonus experience to have, though highlight any additional experience or skills you may have. We like working with people with varied backgrounds and experiences.

 - Production AI/agent experience: Hands-on experience running LLM or agent systems in production, including how they fail differently from deterministic services: nondeterministic outputs

Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!



Who You Are

 - 2–4 years of recruiting experience sourcing and screening technical talent — software engineers, AI/ML engineers, or adjacent roles. Agency, embedded, or in-house all work.

 - Active AI tool user — sourcing agents, automated outreach sequences, AI-assisted screening. Already using these, not learning about them.

 - Credibly fluent on the AI engineering side — can hold a conversation about LLMs, agents, RAG, or evals, and tell the difference between someone who's shipped with this stack and someone who's adjacent to it.

 - Strong written communicator — outreach gets opened and replied to because it sounds like a real person who did the research, not a template.

 - Organized and proactive with admin — keeps the ATS clean, moves candidates through stages without being chased, keeps hiring managers informed.

 - Comfortable in a fast-moving, low-structure environment — things change quickly here and you don't need a lot of hand-holding.

What You'll Do

 - Source proactively for AI and engineering roles across Lazer's Core practice — building targeted lists, writing thoughtful personalized outreach, and running focused sourcing sprints.

 - Manage candidate communications end-to-end: scheduling, coordinating interview loops, keeping candidates warm and informed at every stage.

 - Maintain clean, accurate records in Ashby — stage updates, notes, sourcing tags — so the team always has a clear picture of the pipeline.

 - Screen inbound and sourced candidates at the top of the funnel and pass well-qualified profiles to the Senior Technical Recruiter and hiring managers with clear context.

 - Use AI to do more — build or use sourcing agents, automate repetitive outreach tasks, and keep raising the bar on what you can output independently.

 - Support offer logistics — reference checks, scheduling debrief calls, tracking offer status — so nothing falls through the cracks at the close.

 - Learn the market — develop fluency in AI engineering comp, what candidates care about, and what we're competing against, and surface that intel to the team.

Nice-to-Haves

 - Prior experience recruiting specifically for AI/ML engineering roles

 - Familiarity with Ashby or comparable ATS

 - Existing network in AI engineering or tech talent communities in US or Canada

 - Experience building or using sourcing automation tools (Clay, Apollo, etc.)

AI in our hiring process
We use AI to help us review and shortlist applications based on job-related criteria. A human hiring manager always makes the call on who moves forward. As a company that builds with AI every day, we're all for candidates using it too — just be upfront about how it helped.

Why Work With Us

 - 🚀 Accelerate Your Growth: Work across multiple industries and cutting-edge projects with a team that ships fast.

 - 💥 Maximum Impact: Shape the future of the tech industry by helping ambitious

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer, Agentic AI
source_jobs.description:
Lazer https://www.lazertechnologies.com is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!



Lazer Core is a specialized team within Lazer focused on building robust, AI-powered full-stack applications. We partner closely with ambitious teams across industries to bring cutting-edge products to life, leveraging the latest in AI, agentic workflows, and scalable infrastructure. Our engineers work across the stack, helping clients solve high-impact problems with tailored, production-ready solutions.




WHO YOU ARE:

 - 4–6 years of experience as a Full Stack Engineer working with TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python or Go.

 - Experience with generative AI in areas like image or video generation.

 - Proven experience shipping production software across the stack.

 - Strong experience hosting, tuning, and managing LLM services, libraries, or tools.

 - Experience working with agentic workflows, including creating and using MCP servers.

 - A track record of building AI-powered features such as information extraction, chatbots, document construction, search, data normalization, etc.

 - Familiarity with prompt engineering and structured experimentation workflows.

 - Experience fine-tuning LLMs using open-source models or closed-source services.

 - Confidence in setting up testing infrastructure around agentic applications.

 - Comfort working with at least one major cloud provider (GCP, AWS, Azure), especially data tools like BigQuery, SageMaker, etc.

 - Previous experience in consulting or contracting roles, with the ability to manage client expectations and timelines.


WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Engage with clients to understand their problems, needs, goals, and technical environments.

 - Architect, build, and ship full stack applications that leverage AI and data capabilities.

 - Apply best practices in MLOps or LLMOps, including testing, monitoring, and reliability.

 - Design and build scalable data pipelines and data lakes as needed.

 - Communicate tradeoffs and risks transparently, supporting client decision-making.

 - Collaborate with other engineers and cross-functional teams to deliver impactful results.

 - Stay current with the latest AI trends, technologies, and tooling to bring innovation to your projects.
   


NICE TO HAVE:

The following would be a bonus experience to have, though highlight any additional experience or skills you may have. We like working with people with varied backgrounds and experiences.

 - Experience with generative AI in areas like image or video generation.

 - Familiarity with Kubernetes and container orchestration.

 - Background using ETL frameworks (e.g., Airflow).

 - Skills in mobile development (e.g., React Native, native iOS/Android).

 - Strong design sensibility and user experience intuition.

 - Solid statistics or data science background for intelligent data analysis.

 - Relevant certifications, open-source contributions, or technical publications.

With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!



Lazer Commerce is a specialized team within Lazer focused on crafting scalable, high-performing commerce experiences across the Shopify ecosystem. We partner with forward-thinking brands and agencies to design and implement custom storefronts, headless architectures, and robust backend integrations. From theme development to complex ERP and OMS workflows, our engineers bring deep expertise in Shopify, modern frameworks, and commerce infrastructure to help clients launch, scale, and optimize their digital retail experiences.




THE ROLES:

We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer, Shopify, to join our remote team. We hire across multiple technical tracks depending on your strengths and focus area:





FRONT-END ENGINEER (SHOPIFY)

You’ll build high-performance, visually engaging Shopify storefronts and headless commerce experiences.

What You’ll Do:

 - Build custom Shopify storefronts and themes using Liquid, React, and modern frameworks like Next.js and Remix

 - Translate design mockups and business requirements into high-quality, accessible, and scalable code

 - Implement reusable components, UI logic, and performance optimization best practices

 - Collaborate closely with designers and backend engineers on headless Shopify builds

 - Stay up to date with the latest Shopify front-end updates and trends

You Bring:

 - Strong experience in Liquid and custom theme development

 - Proficiency in React, Next.js, Remix, and TypeScript

 - Familiarity with Shopify Storefront API and headless commerce

 - Passion for creating accessible, fast, and beautiful web experiences




BACK-END ENGINEER (SHOPIFY APPS & EXTENSIONS)


What You’ll Do:

 - Design and build Shopify apps (public/private) and backend APIs using Node.js, Remix, or Next.js

 - Implement Shopify Functions, custom checkout logic, and performance optimizations

 - Work with MongoDB, Supabase, and related databases for data persistence

 - Integrate with third-party APIs, tools, and Shopify Admin/Storefront APIs

 - Collaborate with front-end engineers and product teams on headless commerce builds

You Bring:

 - Strong experience developing within the Shopify ecosystem

 - Hands-on experience with Node.js, Remix, Next.js, and Shopify Functions

 - Knowledge of API authentication, webhooks, and scalable architectures

 - Understanding of deployment pipelines and Git-based workflows
   
   
   


BACK-END ENGINEER (INTEGRATIONS & SYSTEMS ARCHITECTURE)

You’ll focus on building robust, scalable integrations between Shopify and enterprise systems (ERP, OMS, CMS).


What You’ll Do:

 - Develop and maintain backend integrations for Shopify with systems like Netsuite, D365, Manhattan, Contentful, Strapi, and Sanity

 - Handle data migrations and manage ETL processes between legacy and Shopify systems

 - Build services using Node.js, Remix, Next.js, and PostgreSQL

 - Leverage iPaaS tools (C

source_jobs.title: Senior Technical Recruiter - Fintech
source_jobs.description:
Lazer https://www.lazertechnologies.com is a world-class digital product studio composed of 180+ senior engineers and designers with backgrounds from companies like Apple, Google, Coinbase, and more. With our product experience, we have designed, engineered, and grown products from $0 to $200M in revenue.

Clients seek out our help because we have the talent to deeply understand their needs and provide industry, technical, or product insights that are uniquely valuable to their efforts. Our clients range from early-stage startups and venture studios to recognizable retail brands and exciting enterprises. Some of our notable clients include Google, Shopify, Coinbase, Alchemy, Hinge, OVO, Polymarket, and more.

We are a remote-first organization headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with employees worldwide. We believe in providing the best experience possible for all Lazerites by fostering a strong community through regular events, company vacations, competitive compensation, unlimited PTO, and more!

Join Lazer and help us solve problems and build the next generation of products!



Lazer's Fintech practice partners with some of the most ambitious teams in financial software, across payments, lending, capital markets, embedded finance, and AI-native financial products. We still work with leading crypto-native trading and infrastructure projects, but increasingly our footprint is in AI-driven fintech: agents that move money, copilots embedded in trading and lending workflows, LLM-powered underwriting, and intelligent automation across the back office. The bigger story is the convergence: traditional finance platforms are modernizing fast, leveraging AI as a core capability and crypto where it fits, and our practice sits right at that intersection. This space is still being shaped, and the team we hire gets to shape it.

 


WHO YOU ARE

 - 5 to 7 years of full-cycle technical recruiting experience hiring software engineers, with a meaningful chunk of that time spent in fintech or adjacent financial infrastructure (payments, lending, capital markets, embedded finance, financial data platforms), ideally with exposure to AI-native or crypto-native teams

 - A blended background across in-house and agency or embedded search. You've built pipelines from inside a product company and you've also run external search, so you operate well in both modes

 - You actively want to use AI in your day to day recruiting work, not just tolerate it. Sourcing agents, automated outreach, AI-assisted screening, and AI-assisted candidate prep are tools you reach for first, and you're constantly experimenting with new ones

 - Deeply AI-fluent on the candidate side. You can credibly evaluate engineers who are shipping with LLMs, agents, RAG, evals, fine-tuning, and modern AI infrastructure, and you can tell the difference between someone who's truly building with this stack and someone who's just adjacent to it

 - A real, warm network of fintech and applied AI engineering talent across the US and Canada that you can tap on day one

 - An exceptional closer who can articulate technical opportunities to skeptical senior engineers and read what actually motivates them

 - A direct, low-ego operator who is comfortable with ambiguity and a fast-moving environment

 - A strong written communicator. Your outreach gets opened and replied to because it sounds like a human who did the work, not a templated blast


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own the full hiring funnel for engineering roles across Lazer's Fintech practice, from intake to offer signed, with a particular focus on roles at the intersection of finance and AI

 - Partner directly with Cofounders and Fintech leadership to translate strategy into a sharp, prioritized hiring plan

 - Source proactively. The bar is high and most of our hires come from outbound, so you'll be in the trenches building lists, writing thoughtful outreach, and running sourcing sprints

 - Build and run interview loops that move fast and
